name: builder-team-qc
description: Local phase-controlled builder-team QC workflow with strict gates, role contracts, .qc records, Ponytail evidence binding, seam audits, release gates, and no-remote safety scans.

interface.shortDescription: Run local phase gates for multiagent builds.
interface.longDescription: Builder Team QC coordinates phase-controlled software builds with builder, reviewer, test, compliance, integration, and release roles. It creates durable .qc records, applies Ponytail minimal-code discipline with hash-bound evidence, checks previous/current/next seams, records accepted-risk and gate decisions, and blocks remote/API/credential surfaces by default.
defaultPrompt: Start the next QC phase gate.
